name: contentforge
description: Enterprise content production pipeline for Cursor — 10-phase workflow, 19 skills, 29-pattern AI-detection humanizer, C2PA provenance for .docx (EU AI Act Article 50), May 2026 AEO/GEO reality. Shared model curator (scripts/model_registry.json + resolve_model.py): aliases like latest-balanced-anthropic / latest-vision-google resolve to concrete ids at call time; deprecated ids auto-fall-forward. See docs/MODEL-CURATOR.md.
